Jwt.//SigningKey: DEV ONLY. Override per environment via the Jwt__SigningKey secret/env var. HS256 needs >= 32 bytes.

Llm.//: Model-swap seam. Default is used by any agent without an Agents.<SkillName> override.
Llm.//Agents: Per-agent overrides. Keys: RiskAndIssue, Narrative, Challenge, Review. Any empty field inherits from Default. Committed default is empty so the no-key demo (and tests) run fully on 'fake' — set real providers per environment in appsettings.Development.json or via env vars.
Llm.//ApiKey: Never committed. Supply per env: Llm__Default__ApiKey or Llm__Agents__<SkillName>__ApiKey.

HealthScoring.//: PLACEHOLDER — these are the PRD's EXAMPLE values, NOT client-agreed. Replace the whole block with PMO-agreed numbers at kickoff before scoring goes live. Weights must sum to WeightTotal; thresholds are inclusive lower bounds (ordered Amber < Green).

Overrides.Description: Forecast overrun beyond the critical band → minimum Red (EXAMPLE).
Key decision overdue and blocking work → minimum Amber (EXAMPLE).
